conbody.p: This section provides high-level information about the available upgrade and downgrade options.

section.title: Upgrade from a Previous Version
section.p: Upgrade from a previous version to Juniper Cloud-Native Router (JCNR) release 24.2 is not supported. You must uninstall your existing JCNR version before installing JCNR Release 24.2. Please review Upgrading JCNR.

section.title: Downgrade to an Older Version
section.p: There is no procedure for downgrading to an older version. To change from a current version to an older version, you must uninstall the current version and install an older version.
